## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Timothé Ameline (pm.me) to discuss potential collaboration and job opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, fwd.digital, is rapidly growing and closing a Series A round, focusing on AI-driven content and knowledge work automation](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Timothé has extensive SEO and CRO experience, with a preference for in-house roles over agency work](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [fwd.digital is hiring for "Managing Director" roles, which align well with Timothé's skills and interests](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest in continuing discussions, with a potential for a fast-tracked hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

## Topics

### Timothé's Background and Experience

  - [7 years of SEO and CRO experience](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Progressed from content writer to program manager to SEO lead](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Notable achievement: Growing a career advice website from 2M to 7M monthly organic clicks in one year](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Managed 30 websites with a team of 8+ at previous role](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Currently at Single Grain agency, managing 15 clients](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Prefers in-house roles over agency work](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Recent focus on automation and AI in SEO](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Marcel's Background and fwd.digital

  - [Previously worked at IBM, HP, and various startups](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Built successful content platforms (Security Intelligence.com, TechBeacon.com)](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Recent success with AI-assisted content at D-gram, resulting in 24x traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Founded fwd.digital, focusing on AI-driven content and knowledge work automation](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Raised $12M in funding, closing Series A](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Grew from 0 to $6M ARR in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Developed AI workflow engine for complex, multi-step processes](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach and Offerings

  - [Delivers outcomes rather than just tools or agency services](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Uses AI workloads and runtime layer to manage complex processes](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Focuses on content initially, with plans to expand to other knowledge work areas](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Aims to increase productivity in knowledge work similar to coding productivity gains](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Potential Role for Timothé

  - ["Managing Director" position discussed](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Role involves overseeing teams, leading strategy, and interfacing with engineering](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Flexibility in tailoring the role to individual strengths](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Opportunity to be involved in platform development and roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Company Culture and Values

  - [Emphasis on continuous learning, empathy, and process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Aiming to create a positive work environment](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Focus on hiring top talent from leading tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Timothé to Kyle, a current team member in a similar role](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Timothé to provide 1-2 references if open to proceeding](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Marcel to send offer details to Timothé](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting on Friday to continue discussions](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Aim to complete the process by the end of the week if both parties are interested](https://fathom.video/share/soLHwadqdDY5LksUxEXMw8zZ6jhNY-CW?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
